tasks.title: Add Food resource and Greenhouse building
tasks.description: Introduce Food as a new resource type tracked in state.resources and displayed in the resource HUD. Add a Greenhouse building that costs 10 Rocks + 5 Energy (deducted from hovels), can be built by any unit (Elon or Rocktimus) on an empty tile, and generates 3 Food per turn during end-of-turn processing. The Greenhouse has a distinct green glass-panel visual on the canvas and a labeled sprite. Wire up all UI: action button, hotkey, tile info display, and hotkey modal entry.
tasks.acceptance_criteria:
1. Food resource exists in state.resources and is displayed in the resource HUD alongside Rocks and Energy.
2. A 'Build Greenhouse' action button appears when a unit is on an empty tile and player has >= 10 Rocks and >= 5 Energy.
3. Building deducts 10 Rocks and 5 Energy from player resources.
4. Each Greenhouse generates 3 Food per turn in end-of-turn phase.
5. Greenhouse has a distinct visual sprite on the canvas with a label.
6. Food total is visible in the resource panel and updates each turn.
7. Build action follows existing UI patterns (button visibility, disabled states, action logging, hotkey).
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context You are adding a Food resource and Greenhouse building to a vanilla HTML/CSS/JS turn-based strategy game. The entire game is a single IIFE in `game.js` (~1733 lines) with `index.html` and `style.css`. ## Tech Stack - Vanilla JavaScript (ES5/ES6 mix, no modules, no build system) - HTML5 Canvas for rendering - Static CSS - No tests, no package.json, no framework ## Critical Conventions — MATCH EXACTLY ### State - Resources live on `state.resources` object (currently `{ rocks: 0 }`). Add `food: 0`. - Structures are objects in `state.structures[]` with at minimum `{ type: string, row: number, col: number }`. - The `init()` function (line ~1703) resets ALL state — you MUST add `food: 0` to the reset block. ### Building Pattern (follow Rock Hovel / Comm Dish exactly) Every building needs ALL of these pieces: 1. `canBuild*()` — guard function returning boolean 2. `build*()` — action function that deducts resources, pushes to `state.structures`, calls `addLog()`, calls `refreshView()` 3. `draw*(structure)` — canvas rendering function 4. Entry in `drawStructure()` dispatch (if/return chain starting at line ~335) 5. HTML button in `#action-panel` in `index.html` with `class="action-btn"` and `disabled` attribute 6. Entry in `updateUI()` actions array (line ~783) as `["btn-id", canBuild*()]` 7. Click event listener (line ~1591 area) 8. Keyboard shortcut in the keydown handler switch statement (line ~1640 area) 9. Entry in `updateTileInfo()` (line ~843 area) `else if` chain 10. Hotkey table row in `index.html` `#hotkey-modal` ### Energy Deduction Pattern The Greenhouse costs 5 Energy. Follow the Comm Dish pattern exactly (line ~1178-1195): ```js var energyNeeded = 5; for (var i = 0; i < state.structures.length && energyNeeded > 0; i++) { if (state.structures[i].type !== "rock_hovel") continue; var drain = Math.min(state.structures[i].energy, energyNeeded); state.structures[i].energy -= drain; energyNeeded -= drain; } ``` ### End-of-Turn Processing Add `processGreenhouses()` to `endTurn()` after `processSolarPanels()` (line ~1532). Pattern: ```js function processGreenhouses() { var count = 0; for (var i = 0; i < state.structures.length; i++) { if (state.structures[i].type === "greenhouse") count++; } if (count > 0) { var produced = count * 3; state.resources.food += produced; addLog("Greenhouses produced " + produced + " Food! (Total: " + state.resources.food + ")", "energy"); } } ``` ### Drawing Pattern The draw function receives a structure object and uses `structure.col * TILE_SIZE` / `structure.row * TILE_SIZE` for positioning. Use `ctx` (the canvas 2D context) and `TILE_SIZE` (40px). End with a label like: ```js ctx.fillStyle = "#44cc44"; ctx.font = "bold 5px sans-serif"; ctx.textAlign = "center"; ctx.fillText("GRNHSE", x + TILE_SIZE / 2, y + TILE_SIZE - 1); ``` Design the Greenhouse as a green glass-panel structure — use greens (#2d8a2d, #44cc44, #66ff66 range) with a plant/leaf motif inside. Keep it visually distinct from Solar Panel (blue) and Battery (green but smaller/different shape). ### Resource HUD (`index.html`) Add a new `
` inside `#resources-panel` after the Energy row. Use a food-related emoji (🌿 works well for a Mars farm). Pattern: ```html
🌿 Food: 0
``` ### Keyboard Shortcut Use `h` for Greenhouse (H for Greenhouse/Harvest). Add to the switch statement and the hotkey modal table. ### Build Conditions - `canBuildGreenhouse()`: selected unit on empty tile (no structure), `state.resources.rocks >= 10`, `getTotalHovelEnergy() >= 5` - Both Elon and Rocktimus can build (no unit type check needed — same as Rock Hovel) ### UI Update In `updateUI()`, add to the resource display: `document.getElementById("food-count").textContent = state.resources.food;` In the actions array, add: `["build-greenhouse-btn", canBuildGreenhouse()]` ### Log Style Use `"build"` class for the build log entry. Use `"energy"` class for the per-turn food generation log. ## Files to Modify 1. `game.js` — all game logic, rendering, state changes 2. `index.html` — resource HUD row, action button, hotkey table entry 3. `style.css` — NO changes needed (existing `.resource-row` and `.action-btn` styles cover the new elements) ## Gotchas - The game uses a mix of `var` and `const`/`let` — older functions use `var`, newer use `const`/`let`. Use `var` for consistency with building functions. - `getTotalHovelEnergy()` returns the sum of all hovel energy — use this for the >= 5 check. - Button text should include the cost with emoji Unicode entities: `Build Greenhouse (10 🪨 5 ⚡)` - The `drawStructure()` function uses early returns for each type — add the greenhouse check before the default Rock Hovel drawing code. - Make sure the build button is placed in the action panel BEFORE the Comm Dish and Call Earth and Mars Throne buttons (keep those endgame actions at the bottom). - The init function sets `state.resources = { rocks: 0 }` — change to `{ rocks: 0, food: 0 }`.

checklist.description: Add food: 0 to state.resources and init() reset
steps: In game.js, change state.resources from { rocks: 0 } to { rocks: 0, food: 0 } in both the initial state declaration (~line 73) and the init() function (~line 1709)
Verify by searching for 'state.resources' to ensure no other reset points were missed

checklist.description: Add Food resource row in HTML resource panel
steps: In index.html, add a new div.resource-row with 🌿 icon and food-count span inside #resources-panel after the Energy row
Verify the HTML is well-formed and follows the exact pattern of the Rocks and Energy rows
In game.js updateUI(), add document.getElementById('food-count').textContent = state.resources.food after the energy-count update
Verify the element ID matches the one added in index.html
Add canBuildGreenhouse() function that checks: no structure on unit's tile, rocks >= 10, getTotalHovelEnergy() >= 5
Verify it returns boolean and follows the pattern of canBuildCommDish()
Add buildGreenhouse() that calls canBuildGreenhouse() guard, deducts 10 rocks, deducts 5 energy from hovels (Comm Dish pattern), pushes greenhouse structure, logs, and refreshes
Verify energy deduction loop matches the Comm Dish pattern exactly

checklist.description: Add Build Greenhouse button to HTML action panel
steps: In index.html #action-panel, add button#build-greenhouse-btn with text 'Build Greenhouse (10 🪨 5 ⚡)' before the Comm Dish button
Verify it has class='action-btn' and disabled attribute

checklist.description: Wire greenhouse button in updateUI() actions array
steps: Add ['build-greenhouse-btn', canBuildGreenhouse()] to the actions array in updateUI()
Verify it's placed in the correct position (after build-rocktimus-btn, before build-comm-dish-btn)

checklist.description: Add click event listener and keyboard shortcut for greenhouse
steps: Add click event listener for build-greenhouse-btn that calls buildGreenhouse()
Add case 'h' to the keyboard switch statement that calls buildGreenhouse()
Add hotkey row to the hotkey modal table in index.html: <kbd>H</kbd> → Build Greenhouse
Create drawGreenhouse(structure) function with a distinct green glass-panel visual
Add dispatch entry in drawStructure() before the default Rock Hovel code
Verify the sprite is visually distinct from Solar Panel and Battery

checklist.description: Add greenhouse to tile info display
steps: In updateTileInfo(), add else if (tileStructure.type === 'greenhouse') { structureText = 'Greenhouse'; } to the structure type chain
Verify placement follows the existing if/else if pattern
Add processGreenhouses() function that counts greenhouses and adds 3 * count to state.resources.food with a log entry
Call processGreenhouses() in endTurn() after processSolarPanels()
Verify the log uses the 'energy' class and shows total food

checklist.description: Verify all pieces work together end-to-end
steps: Open the game in browser (or review all changes holistically)
Confirm food shows 0 in resource panel at start
Confirm Build Greenhouse button appears/hides correctly based on resources and tile state
Confirm building deducts correct resources
Confirm food increments by 3 per greenhouse per turn
Confirm greenhouse sprite renders on the map tile

quality_checklist.description: No duplicated resource deduction logic — energy deduction uses the same pattern as Comm Dish
steps: Search for energy deduction loops and verify the greenhouse version matches the Comm Dish pattern
Check there are no off-by-one errors in the energy drain loop

quality_checklist.description: All state paths include food — init reset, state declaration, and any other state reset points
steps: Search for 'state.resources' assignments and verify food is included everywhere rocks is
Verify init() reset doesn't miss the food property

quality_checklist.description: UI consistency — button placement, naming, and disabled state follow existing patterns exactly
steps: Verify the greenhouse button is positioned logically in the action panel (after Rocktimus, before Comm Dish)
Verify the button text format matches other build buttons (name + cost in emoji)
Verify the updateUI actions array order matches the HTML button order

quality_checklist.description: Canvas rendering is clean and visually distinct
steps: Verify the drawGreenhouse function uses a consistent color palette that differs from Solar Panel (blue) and Battery (small green square)
Verify the label text fits within the tile and uses the standard font pattern
Check that drawStructure() dispatch is correct with early return

quality_checklist.description: No unused code or leftover comments — changes are minimal and focused
steps: Review the diff for any debug code, TODO comments, or unnecessary additions
Verify no existing functionality was broken by the changes

checks.description: Food resource appears in the resource HUD with initial value 0
steps: Open the game at http://localhost:8080
Look at the sidebar resource panel
Verify a Food row with 🌿 icon shows '0'

checks.description: Build Greenhouse button appears when conditions are met
steps: Accumulate >= 10 Rocks and >= 5 Energy (build hovel, wait for solar panels)
Select a unit on an empty tile
Verify 'Build Greenhouse' button is visible and enabled

checks.description: Building a Greenhouse deducts resources and places structure
steps: Click 'Build Greenhouse' when enabled
Verify Rocks decreased by 10 and Energy decreased by 5
Verify a greenhouse sprite appears on the tile with a label
After building a greenhouse, click End Turn
Verify Food count increases by 3
Verify a log entry appears about food production

checks.description: Keyboard shortcut H builds a greenhouse
steps: With sufficient resources on an empty tile, press H key
Verify a greenhouse is built (same as clicking the button)
